summary: Flow Fusion 1.0 — the first stable release.

items.body: Focus sessions with customizable Work and Chill phases — build your own or start from a ready-made template.
Session editor with per-session focus rules and manual phase switching.
Focus blocking: distracting apps are closed gracefully (Windows & macOS) and websites are blocked (Windows) during Work phases.
Activity heatmap calendar to track your focus streaks.
Guided onboarding with in-app tips for first-time users.
System tray, desktop notifications and native window controls.
Automatic updates (OTA) with an in-app update banner, plus "Check for updates" and "What's new" in Settings.
Crash-safe startup: global error handling, file logging and one-click diagnostics export in Settings.
Focus blocking now also covers apps running in fullscreen.
More reliable app blocking when a blocked app is reopened mid-phase.
Fixed a crash when upgrading the database from an older version (v2 to v3 migration).
